description:
Overview:

1.【Dynamic Water Ripple Lamp】Unique water ripple structure plus rotatable mode, so the light reflected on the wall can be like a soft water flow, adding a warm feeling to your bedroom and living room to help you sleep.
2.【USB Charging with Remote Control】Equipped with USB charging cable, no need to fix the power supply, where to go to use. The remote allows you to adjust the color and brightness remotely.
3.【16 Kinds of Light Colors】This table lamp also has 16 light colors temperature, intimate and convenient, delicate and comfortable, natural and soft.
4.【Using Special 3D Technology】Water ripple driven by internal rotating light plate. The refraction of the light through the crystal lamp is bright and colorful, very stylish.
5.【Perfect Gift】This is the perfect gift for anyone who loves lighting up their space! Also a novel and lovely gift for family friends and lovers. I'm sure they will be very happy to receive this on Valentine's Day, Mother's Day, Father's Day or their birthday.


Product Information:
Light color: 16 colors rechargeable [Square]-remote control, 16 colors plug-in type [Crown]-remote control
Material: ABS acrylic
Power supply: 3W
Intelligent control or not: APP control
Size: 110x110mm


Packing List:
Night light * 1, remote control * 1


Product Image:
